data.title: At-Bay launches cyber insurance solutions for ransomware & fraud, first in the industry. - SF, 0% retalised.
data.description: In San Francisco, At-Bay has introduced pioneering solutions that provide essential cyber insurance coverage for ransomware and financial fraud, catering to the industry's unmet needs. This initiative marks a significant breakthrough in the cyber insurance sector.

data.title: Genius Sports switches auditors from Withum to KPMG after 2025 financial statements audit, NYSE:GENI.
data.description: Genius Sports Limited (NYSE: GENI) has revealed its plan to switch independent auditors, moving from WithumSmith+Brown, PC to KPMG LLP after Withum completes auditing the financial statements for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. Genius Sports, a key player in the sports, betting, and media connection sphere, aims to make this transition as it progresses in its journey as a publicly traded company.

data.title: Fathom has achieved a 95.5/100 rating in autonomous coding report with customers validating over 90% automation rates.
data.description: In San Francisco, Fathom, a prominent company specializing in autonomous medical coding, has revealed that it received an impressive 95.5 out of 100 overall performance score from clients. The company also secured higher than average ratings on 12 out of 14 numeric indicators assessed in the latest KLAS Research report titled "Autonomous Coding 2025: A Promising Start for an Early Market" released in August 2025. The comprehensive report by KLAS Research delved into customer reviews and experiences with various autonomous coding providers through detailed interviews, positioning Fathom as a top performer in the industry.

data.title: Pagaya raises revolving credit facility to $132 million, cutting cost of debt by 35% from SOFR+750 to SOFR+350.
data.description: A technology company, Pagaya Technologies LTD. (NASDAQ: PGY), has announced the amendment and expansion of its revolving credit facility in New York. The existing facility has been increased to $132 million, surpassing the previous $58 million. This expansion will allow the company to reduce its cost of debt capital significantly. The interest rate has decreased by approximately 35%, dropping from SOFR+750 to SOFR+350. This move is expected to have a positive impact on the company's financial operations.

data.title: Airia launches AI Security Posture Management to address the ungoverned growth of agents in enterprises, strengthening AI risk management. #Airia #AISecurity #EnterpriseAI
data.description: In Atlanta, Airia has introduced AI Security Posture Management, a solution aimed at addressing a critical issue faced by security leaders - the uncontrolled proliferation of agents. This technology aims to tackle this challenge by providing a comprehensive approach to managing security. The launch of this system marks a significant step in addressing this issue, offering an innovative way to handle the growing number of agents within organizations.

data.title: Instnt expands certifications to operate in multiple states in Northeast U.S. - New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Ohio, New York.
data.description: Instnt, the pioneering identity fraud insurance provider, has recently broadened its operational scope to cover several states in the Northeastern United States. The company's certification now extends to New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Ohio, in addition to New York where it was previously approved. Instnt has successfully obtained the essential state certifications required to facilitate insurance business activities in these regions.

data.title: Autonomize AI adds Michele Paige and Tamara Elias, MD to Growth Advisory Board in healthcare. Key advisors aid company strategy.
data.description: A company based in Austin, Texas called Autonomize AI has recently appointed Michele Paige and Tamara Elias, MD to its Growth Advisory Board. They will be joining a notable group of leaders such as Joan Harvey, Pritesh Gandhi, MD, MPH, Anthony Nguyen, MD, MBA, and Sarah Bezerredi who are actively involved in shaping Autonomize's strategy. This move comes as the company aims to expand its influence in the healthcare and life sciences sectors. Autonomize is known for its Agentic AI orchestration and is looking to make an impact across health plans, providers, and pharmacy benefit management organizations with the help of these appointments.

data.title: SAAS NORTH celebrates 10 years with 2,000 attendees and 800 companies in Ottawa on Nov 5-6, 2025, showcasing tech innovation.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, SAAS NORTH - the leading conference for Software as a Service, AI-native, and cloud software scaleup companies in Canada - marks its 10th year of growth and tech innovation on November 5-6, 2025. The event, held at Ottawa’s Rogers Centre, is expected to host more than 2,000 attendees and 800 top SaaS firms from across North America. This milestone conference will bring together industry leaders and innovators for a two-day celebration of the latest trends and developments in the tech world.

data.title: Aprovall and Owlin collaborate to provide real-time third-party risk insights to 32,000 users, combining Aprovall's expertise with Owlin's adverse media monitoring solution.
data.description: In a recent development in Amsterdam and Paris, a collaboration has been announced between Aprovall, known for 20 years of proficiency in third-party risk assessment and management, and Owlin, a global adverse media monitoring entity. This partnership aims to enhance Aprovall's TPRM platform by integrating Owlin's extensive intelligence capabilities. With this integration, Aprovall's platform, utilized by 32,000 users, will now have access to Owlin's global adverse media monitoring solution. This will enable users to perform continuous monitoring by assessing early warning indicators (risk scores) present in millions of news articles. By leveraging these insights, users can proactively address potential risks associated with external third parties.

data.title: FinQuery receives majority growth investment from TA Associates, aims to accelerate growth. Serving 8,700+ companies since 2011.
data.description: In Atlanta, FinQuery, a top provider of AI-based accounting automation solutions, revealed a substantial growth investment from TA Associates, a prominent global private equity firm. This collaboration seeks to propel FinQuery's expansion as it pursues its goal of automating accounting on a consolidated sub-ledger platform. Established in 2011, FinQuery caters to over 8,700 firms and entities, empowering Controllers and CFOs to enhance compliance and efficiency.
REDFIN: PENDING U.S. HOME SALES FELL 1% YEAR OVER YEAR

data.title: U.S. Army chooses Persistent Systems to provide Next Gen Command and Control Network, part of tech modernization push.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Persistent Systems, LLC revealed that their Wave Relay® MANET has been selected as the foundational network for the NGC2 prototype in the U.S. Army's initiative for modernizing technology. This initiative signifies a significant step forward in enhancing military communications, with the Wave Relay® MANET setting the standard for mobile ad hoc networking technology. The development aims to leverage cutting-edge solutions to bolster the effectiveness of the Army's operations. The NGC2 prototype is anticipated to demonstrate advanced capabilities, with a focus on achieving seamless and reliable communication in dynamic operational environments. This partnership reflects the commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements, with potential far-reaching impacts on defense strategies.

data.title: AppGate's ZTNA solution approved by DoW's P1 Marketplace, pre-approved for govt acquisition after competitive evaluation.
data.description: AppGate, a prominent provider of Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) solutions globally, has been designated as "Awardable" on the Department of War (DoW) Platform One (P1) Solutions Marketplace. This accreditation signifies that AppGate's ZTNA solution has successfully completed a thorough competitive assessment and is now authorized for government procurement. The P1 Solutions Marketplace is a digital platform featuring concise pitches, with videos lasting around five minutes, designed to expedite the government acquisition process. This recognition allows AppGate to streamline its offerings for government entities.

data.title: FENC creates world's 1st midsoles from waste PET bottles for sustainable footwear, pioneering eco-friendly innovation.
data.description: In Taipei on October 2, 2025, Far Eastern New Century Corporation (FENC) made headlines as a top player in eco-friendly polyester products. FENC focuses on creating sustainable materials through continuous innovation. A significant milestone was reached in 2025 when FENC pioneered advancements in footwear technology, making them the first company to do so.

data.title: Novacore to acquire Minglewood Risk, expanding real estate insurance segment in NYC and beyond. Oct. 2, 2025.
data.description: Novacore has strengthened its habitational portfolio with the acquisition of a company possessing specialized underwriting knowledge and a well-established collection of properties in New York City and other markets. The acquisition, announced on October 2, 2025 in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania, enhances Novacore's capabilities with expertise directly catering to niche markets. This move signifies Novacore's commitment to expanding its offerings and presence in the insurance industry.

data.title: Eyelit Technologies recognized as a Leader in MES Technology with emphasis on real-time decision-making.
data.description: Eyelit Technologies, a manufacturer-focused company based in Holmdel, New Jersey, has been acknowledged as a Leader in the inaugural Manufacturing Execution System (MES) Technology Value Matrix 2025 by Nucleus Research. This recognition highlights Eyelit's expertise in efficient planning, scheduling, and execution systems for manufacturers. The report underscores the transformation of MES platforms into fundamental facilitators of instantaneous decision-making and production flexibility. By providing real-time visibility and enhanced interoperability, these systems are vital for enhancing operational efficiency.

data.title: First Brands Group gets court approval to access $500M of $1.1B debtor-in-possession financing for chapter 11 cases.
data.description: In Rochester Hills, Michigan, First Brands Group, LLC, a prominent supplier of aftermarket automotive parts worldwide, disclosed that it has obtained consent from the United States Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas concerning its chapter 11 cases for its U.S. operations. The Court has authorized the Company to promptly utilize $500 million from a total of $1.1 billion in debtor-in-possession funds.

data.title: GeoPark Investor Day on Oct 21 in NYC to highlight Vaca Muerta entry and long-term growth strategies. Senior management team to present.
data.description: In Colombia, GeoPark Limited, a prominent energy company with over two decades of experience in Latin America, revealed plans for a hybrid Investor Day to be held on Tuesday, October 21, 2025, in New York City. The event will showcase presentations by key executives, including CEO Felipe Bayon, CFO Jaime Caballero, and Chief Exploration Officer Rodrigo Dalle Fiore. GeoPark Limited is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GPRK.

data.title: Indeavor launches Benefits & ROI Calculator for workforce savings. Helps understand value of labor management.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin, Indeavor, a top workforce solutions provider, has introduced the Benefits & ROI Calculator. This interactive tool aids organizations in grasping the quantifiable benefits of enhancing frontline labor management. Frontline operations encounter ongoing hurdles such as intricate 24-hour shifts, elevated turnover rates, and unanticipated absences leading to decreased productivity and higher expenses. With this new calculator, companies can now quantify the advantages of optimizing their frontline workforce.

data.title: Ebb Carbon launches Project Macoma in Port Angeles to combat ocean acidification by removing CO₂; promising solution.
data.description: Ebb Carbon revealed that Project Macoma has commenced operations at the Port of Port Angeles. This temporary pilot project follows two years of testing at PNNL-Sequim and demonstrates the efficacy of ocean-based carbon removal. The initiative aims to combat local ocean acidification and reduce atmospheric CO₂ levels. Ebb's marine CO₂ removal method is viewed as a promising solution for addressing climate change and acidification challenges, underlining the importance of its success.
